create_MCPServerConfig: create an MCP server config with name, transport type, URL, and rate limiting settings
convert_MCPToolDefinition_to_litellm_for: convert an MCP tool definition to LiteLLM OpenAI function calling format for LLM consumption
track_ToolCallRecord: track a tool call record with status updates, error categorization, and idempotency key computation
query_RankingIndex_for_query: query the tool ranking index to find top-k tools relevant to a natural language query
manage_OrchestrationSession: manage an orchestration session by adding call records and checking wall-clock timeout status
